/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesconfig.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesconfig.so CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/change_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/fawkesconfig_tolua.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/net_list_content.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/sqlite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/netconf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/net_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesconfig.dir/yaml.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -L/usr/lib64 -lyaml-cpp -lstdc++ /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so -L/usr/lib64 -lsqlite3 /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -L/usr/lib64 /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon -lrt -ldl -lpthread -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto -lstdc++ -lm
